title: Komm Susser Tod Who is Arianne
display_title: Komm Susser Tod Who is Arianne
wikitext:
[]: Komm, Susser Tod - Who is Arianne?             Quote Post by 0x2eleven » Fri May 28, 2010 1:38 am I've looked on the interwebs for any info I can find about Arianne, the person credited as the singer of the song Komm, Susser Tod , but haven't found anything. Anyone know anything the interwebs doesn't?

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri May 28, 2010 1:42 am http://wiki.evageeks.org/Arianne We know about as much as you do.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri May 28, 2010 2:50 am Wasn't there at some point a social networking page for who we thought was "Arianne" that (if I am remembering this correctly) included her performances? It didn't offer up a lot of info about her, but I vaguely remember some pictures.

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Fri May 28, 2010 4:34 am http://www.last.fm/music/Arianne There is one gospel singer off of Brazil called Arianne de Souza Pinto. http://www.arianne.com.br/home.php Which is the one the got on that photo, don't think it's her by the voice though. Anyway this chick performs with LOREN & MASH every now and then, apparently. Look at these and listen to see if it's her: http://itunes.apple.com/us/album/i-dont-wanna-cry/id339432706 http://www.ilike.com/artist/Arianne

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri May 28, 2010 11:01 am LastFM fucked up by lumping Brazil!Arianne and EoE!Arianne together. It's a mistake on their part. Arianne also sang Everything You've Ever Dreamed (unused EoE song), not just Komm Susser Tod, for what its worth. At least Clarie has a MySpace and is super nice (I said hi to her once ) but I want to know more about Arianne and her other work! I'll check out and listen to the samples later. Itunes Japan thinks the "I don't wanna cry" singer is her though, and she looks kinda Japanese....

[]:             Quote Post by 0x2eleven » Fri May 28, 2010 12:25 pm Ornette wrote: Wasn't there at some point a social networking page for who we thought was "Arianne" that (if I am remembering this correctly) included her performances? It didn't offer up a lot of info about her, but I vaguely remember some pictures.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri May 28, 2010 12:29 pm I just realized I totally missed the chance to do "It's me. I'm Arianne." I'm getting rusty...

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri May 28, 2010 1:02 pm ZapX wrote: I just realized I totally missed the chance to do "It's me. I'm Arianne." I'm getting rusty...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri May 28, 2010 1:27 pm Just listened to the preview. I guess it's not her, the voices only sound slightly similar. Are we EVER going to find out anything about this woman?!

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Fri May 28, 2010 1:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Are we EVER going to find out anything about this woman?!

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri May 28, 2010 2:57 pm 0x2eleven wrote: You wouldn't happen to remember which social networking site it was, would you?

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Fri May 28, 2010 11:00 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Just listened to the preview. I guess it's not her, the voices only sound slightly similar. Are we EVER going to find out anything about this woman?!

[]:             Quote Post by 0x2eleven » Sat May 29, 2010 4:01 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Just listened to the preview. I guess it's not her, the voices only sound slightly similar. Are we EVER going to find out anything about this woman?!

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Jun 01, 2010 6:47 pm How about this idea: We study theories about the multiverse. 2) We exchange addresses and find out where we can meet. 3) Go there and build a machine that takes us into other Universes, and we go to the DragonBall Universe. 4) We gather the DragonBalls, and summon Shenlong. 5) I say: "I wish Arianne was in front of us, and that she would make sweet, sweet love to me. Oh, and bring in a human-sized Eva for Reichu." 6) We go back, but leave brikhaus behind.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoRitsukoFan » Mon Jun 28, 2010 9:21 pm I seriously would love to know too.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Jun 28, 2010 11:29 pm MisatoRitsukoFan wrote: I seriously would love to know too.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Jun 28, 2010 11:49 pm The true mystery of Evangelion: "Who the fuck is Arianne?" I bet it's Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Jun 29, 2010 10:10 am Sachi wrote: The true mystery of Evangelion: "Who the fuck is Arianne?" I bet it's Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by MisatoRitsukoFan » Thu Jul 15, 2010 9:35 am Tiffany Grant said she didn't know who Arianne was either. Perhaps there is someone here or somewhere that knows Shiro Sagisu and the english translator for KST that can ask about her...or Loren and Mash.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sun Feb 20, 2011 5:42 pm last.fm wrote: Arianne is a mysterious singer who performed two songs written by Hideaki Anno specially for his film “The End Of Evangelion”. “Komm, süsser Tod” (ger. “Come, Sweet Death”) can be heard in the movie while “Everything You’ve Ever Dreamed” is only on the OST. She also sang versions of “The Time Warp”, “Over At The Frankenstein Place” and “Science Fiction Double Feature” for the “Rocky Horror Show” point and click PC game.
